items.title: Certificate of Incorporation
items.description: Original Certificate of Incorporation, Amended and Restated versions, state filing receipts

items.title: Bylaws
items.description: Original Bylaws, Amended and Restated versions, current effective version

items.title: Formation Documents
items.description: Delaware franchise tax receipts, registered agent agreements, initial organizational resolutions, IRS Form SS-4 and EIN confirmation

items.title: Amendments to Formation Documents
items.description: All amendments to formation documents, Certificates of Amendment, state filing confirmations

items.title: Board Materials
items.description: Board meeting minutes (chronological), written consents in lieu of meetings, board resolutions, board presentations

items.title: Stockholder Materials
items.description: Stockholder meeting minutes, written consents, stockholder resolutions, voting agreements

items.title: Committee Materials
items.description: Audit Committee materials, Compensation Committee materials, other committee materials

items.title: Corporate Policies
items.description: Code of Conduct, Conflict of Interest Policy, Whistleblower Policy, Document Retention Policy, Insider Trading Policy

items.title: Cap Table
items.description: Current capitalization table (Excel/Carta export), historical cap tables, fully diluted analysis, waterfall analysis

items.title: Stock Issuances
items.description: Stock purchase agreements, stock certificates or ledger, 83(b) elections, founder stock documentation

items.title: Stock Options & Equity Plans
items.description: Stock option plan documents, individual option grants, exercise notices, RSU/RSA agreements

items.title: Financing Round Documents
items.description: Term sheets, Stock Purchase Agreements, Investor Rights Agreements, Voting Agreements, ROFR Agreements, investor decks, closing documents

items.title: Convertible Notes & SAFEs
items.description: Note/SAFE purchase agreements, conversion records, cap table impact analysis

items.title: Warrants
items.description: Warrant agreements, exercise records

items.title: Customer Contracts
items.description: Master Service Agreements, Statements of Work, order forms, contract summary spreadsheet

items.title: Vendor & Supplier Agreements
items.description: Software licenses, service provider agreements, manufacturing agreements, supply agreements

items.title: Partnership Agreements
items.description: Strategic partnership agreements, joint venture agreements, reseller agreements, distribution agreements

items.title: Other Material Contracts
items.description: Any contract >$50K annual value, long-term commitments, contracts with unusual terms

items.title: Patents
items.description: Issued patents, pending applications, patent assignments, freedom-to-operate analyses

items.title: Trademarks
items.description: Registered trademarks, pending applications, trademark assignments

items.title: Copyrights
items.description: Copyright registrations, work-for-hire agreements, open source compliance

items.title: IP Assignments
items.description: Founder IP assignment agreements, employee IP assignment agreements, contractor IP assignments

items.title: IP Licenses
items.description: Inbound licenses, outbound licenses, open source license inventory

items.title: Trade Secrets & Confidentiality
items.description: Trade secret documentation, NDA templates, confidentiality policies

items.title: Employee Agreements
items.description: Executive employment agreements, offer letters, at-will employment confirmations

items.title: Consultant & Contractor Agreements
items.description: Independent contractor agreements, consulting agreements, SOWs

items.title: Equity Plans & Grants
items.description: Equity incentive plan, individual grant agreements, vesting schedules

items.title: Benefits Plans
items.description: Health insurance, 401(k) plan documents, other benefit plan summaries

items.title: Org Chart & Headcount
items.description: Current org chart, headcount by department, employee roster

items.title: HR Policies
items.description: Employee handbook, non-compete and non-solicitation policies, harassment policies

items.title: Financial Statements
items.description: Last 24 months P&L, balance sheet, cash flow statements (GAAP)

items.title: Budgets & Projections
items.description: Current year budget, 3-year financial model, key assumptions

items.title: Bank Statements
items.description: Last 12 months bank statements for all accounts

items.title: Debt Obligations
items.description: Loan agreements, lines of credit, promissory notes, debt schedule

items.title: Audit Reports
items.description: Audited financial statements, auditor management letters (if any)

items.title: Litigation & Disputes
items.description: Pending or threatened litigation, arbitration proceedings, demand letters

items.title: Regulatory Filings
items.description: SEC filings (if applicable), state regulatory filings, foreign qualification filings

items.title: Compliance Certifications
items.description: SOC 2, ISO certifications, industry-specific compliance certifications

items.title: Government Correspondence
items.description: Material correspondence with government agencies, regulatory inquiries, responses

items.title: Business Plan & Pitch Deck
items.description: Current business plan, investor pitch deck, executive summary

items.title: Marketing Materials
items.description: Product brochures, website screenshots, case studies, press releases

items.title: Product Documentation
items.description: Product roadmap, technical architecture overview, API documentation

items.title: Key Metrics & KPIs
items.description: MRR/ARR history, customer count, churn rate, unit economics

items.title: Federal & State Tax Returns
items.description: Last 3 years federal and state income tax returns

items.title: Tax Notices & Correspondence
items.description: IRS and state tax notices, audit correspondence, tax dispute documentation

items.title: R&D Tax Credits
items.description: R&D tax credit studies, supporting documentation

items.title: Sales Tax & Payroll Tax
items.description: Sales tax registrations and filings, payroll tax records, 1099s

items.title: Insurance Policies
items.description: D&O insurance, general liability, E&O/professional liability, cyber liability, workers compensation

items.title: Insurance Claims History
items.description: History of insurance claims filed in last 3 years

items.title: Office Leases
items.description: Current office lease agreements, lease amendments, sublease agreements

items.title: Equipment & Asset Schedules
items.description: Fixed asset schedule, equipment leases, material personal property

items.title: Real Property Ownership
items.description: Deeds, title insurance, property tax records (if company owns real property)
